TargetName: Design foundation (pricing negotiated post-geotech; estimate based on normal ground conditions)

Notes: FACT. Confirmed in decomposition SSOW section C and scope ledger. SOW-0019 maps to PKG-002 / DEL-002-02 / DEL-002-10 / DEL-002-11.

TargetName: Produce complete P.Eng.-stamped IFC design documentation across all disciplines
Statement: DEL-002-11 supports OBJ-003: Complete IFC documentation
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in decomposition section 5 (Objectives) and section 7 (PKG-002, DEL-002-11 row).

TargetName: Deliver project within negotiated stipulated contract price; foundation costs reconciled post-geotech
Statement: DEL-002-11 supports OBJ-006: Variable-price foundation cost reconciliation
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in decomposition section 5 (Objectives) and section 7 (PKG-002, DEL-002-11 row).

Statement: Geotech report required before final foundation pricing can be negotiated and before IFC design is finalized; design may proceed on assumed conditions for proposal phase
EvidenceQuote: Full geotechnical investigation and report (DEL-008-01) must be available before final foundation pricing
Notes: FACT. RFP section 4.8.2 and section 3.3.2 both mandate geotech input. Multiple source documents confirm this prerequisite (Datasheet Conditions; Specification REQ-002 and REQ-003; Procedure Step 2.1).

Statement: Preliminary Structural Design must receive County project team approval before IFC foundation documents are finalized
EvidenceQuote: Preliminary Structural Design (DEL-002-01) must receive County project team approval before IFC
Notes: FACT. RFP section 3.3.2 requires preliminary design approval before IFC. Confirmed in Specification REQ-012 and Procedure Step 2.6.

Statement: Foundation design produced by DEL-002-11 feeds the Foundation Plan drawing deliverable (DEL-002-02)
EvidenceQuote: Foundation design produced here feeds the Foundation Plan drawing deliverable
Notes: FACT. Datasheet Conditions states this deliverable produces design that feeds DEL-002-02. Direction corrected from UPSTREAM/INTERFACE to DOWNSTREAM/HANDOVER to reflect actual information flow: DEL-002-11 produces foundation design output consumed by DEL-002-02.

Statement: This design package is the direct technical basis for PKG-010 Foundation Construction; IFC drawing set issued to General Contractor
EvidenceQuote: This design package is the direct technical basis for PKG-010 Foundation Construction
Notes: FACT. Datasheet Conditions and Procedure Step 2.7 item 5 confirm IFC drawings are issued to PKG-010 for construction.

Statement: Building footprint and column grid must be confirmed with Architect (DEL-001-02) before footing layout is finalized
EvidenceQuote: Architectural Floor Plans (DEL-001-02) — REQUIRED for column grid and building footprint confirmation
Notes: FACT. Procedure Prerequisites table lists DEL-001-02 as REQUIRED. Guidance P-5 also states: confirm building footprint and column grid with the Architect. Procedure Step 1.1 item 1 and Step 2.4 item 6 reinforce this.

Statement: Cistern dimensions and weight required from Plumbing Engineer before final slab/foundation load schedule can be completed
EvidenceQuote: Cistern dimensions and weight (from Plumbing Engineer) — REQUIRED before final slab/foundation load schedule
Notes: FACT. Procedure Prerequisites table lists cistern data as REQUIRED. Guidance P-5 confirms: confirm cistern location and size with Plumbing Engineer (DEL-006-04). Datasheet REQ-010 also requires cistern load to be accounted for.

Statement: Crane technical data (wheel loads and rail spacing) required for crane column base and foundation design; if unavailable at proposal phase use assumed values and flag for revision
EvidenceQuote: Crane technical data (wheel loads, rail spacing) — REQUIRED for crane column base and foundation design
Notes: FACT. Procedure Prerequisites table lists crane data as REQUIRED. Guidance Crane Support Interface section and F-003 note confirm this interface. If unavailable at proposal, assumed values may be used per Guidance.

Statement: Foundation structural calculations produced by DEL-002-11 contribute to the broader Structural Calculation Package (DEL-002-10)
EvidenceQuote: Document calculations in the Structural Calculation Package (contributes to DEL-002-10)
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 2.3 item 4 explicitly states foundation calculations contribute to DEL-002-10. Specification Documentation table also references this.

Statement: Foundation steel plate embedment details must be coordinated with DEL-002-08 Embedment Plan
SourceRef: Steps > Step 2.3 item 3 and Step 2.4 item 2
EvidenceQuote: Steel plate embedments: confirm adequate anchorage into slab (coordinate with DEL-002-08 Embedment Plan)
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 2.3 item 3 and Step 2.4 item 2 both reference coordination with DEL-002-08 for steel plate embedment details.

Statement: Foundation design must comply with RFP section 4.8.2 variable-price requirements and section 3.3.2 scope of services as binding contractual constraints
EvidenceQuote: The Proponent shall provide a cost estimate based on normal ground conditions
Notes: FACT. RFP is the binding contractual document establishing the variable-price mechanism and scope of services. Multiple requirements (REQ-001 through REQ-005) trace directly to RFP sections.
